plan_review_notes: Plan narrowed to the live MCP bootstrap/import-resolution bug. Acceptance now requires direct MCP request_task recovery and regression coverage for stale taskflow template resolution.

plan_review_history.notes: Plan narrowed to the live MCP bootstrap/import-resolution bug. Acceptance now requires direct MCP request_task recovery and regression coverage for stale taskflow template resolution.

spec_review_notes: Spec frozen for MCP runtime/bootstrap repair only. Scope excludes task-creation semantics changes beyond canonical sisyphus template resolution after reconnect.

normal_cases.name: Live MCP `sisyphus.request_task` succeeds in the root repository after reconnect.
CLI fallback task creation still works after the bootstrap change.

edge_cases.name: MCP startup still prefers repo `src/` over stale installed packages when both exist.
Reconnect path keeps using `sisyphus/templates_data` without requiring `taskflow` compatibility aliases.

exception_cases.name: Startup failures surface an actionable runtime/bootstrap error instead of a misleading missing-template path.

verification_methods.target: Live MCP sisyphus.request_task succeeds in the root repository after reconnect.
CLI fallback task creation still works after the bootstrap change.
MCP startup still prefers repo src/ over stale installed packages when both exist.
Startup failures surface an actionable runtime/bootstrap error instead of a misleading missing-template path.
